title: SQL Queries: JOIN, Aggregates & Views
summary: SELECT nâng cao: JOIN nhiều bảng, GROUP BY, HAVING, aggregate functions (COUNT, AVG, SUM), SQL Views.
content_html:
SQL Query Structure

SELECT columns
FROM table
[JOIN other_table ON condition]
[WHERE row_filter]
[GROUP BY column]
[HAVING group_filter]
[ORDER BY column ASC|DESC]
[LIMIT offset, count]

Quan trọng: WHERE lọc individual rows TRƯỚC GROUP BY. HAVING lọc groups SAU GROUP BY. Không thể dùng WHERE với aggregate columns.

JOIN Types

JOIN TypeKết quả
INNER JOINChỉ rows khớp ở cả 2 bảng
LEFT JOINTất cả rows bảng trái + khớp từ bảng phải
RIGHT JOINTất cả rows bảng phải + khớp từ bảng trái
FULL OUTER JOINTất cả rows cả 2 bảng
SELECT a.artist, a.title, t.track_number, t.title AS track
FROM album AS a
JOIN track AS t ON a.id = t.album_id
ORDER BY a.artist, a.title, t.track_number;

Aggregate Functions

SELECT Region,
  COUNT(*) AS total_countries,
  AVG(Population) AS avg_pop,
  MIN(Population) AS min_pop,
  MAX(Population) AS max_pop,
  SUM(Population) AS total_pop
FROM Country
GROUP BY Region
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY total_countries DESC;

SQL Views

View là saved query để tái sử dụng. Có thể dùng như table trong các query khác.

CREATE VIEW trackView AS
SELECT id, album_id, title, track_number,
  duration / 60 AS minutes, duration % 60 AS seconds
FROM track;

-- Dùng view như table
SELECT a.title, t.track_number, t.minutes, t.seconds
FROM album AS a
JOIN trackView AS t ON t.album_id = a.id;

Column Alias (AS)

SELECT Name AS Country, Code AS ISO,
  Population / 1000000.0 AS Pop_Millions
FROM Country
ORDER BY Pop_Millions DESC;

exercises.title: WHERE vs HAVING
exercises.prompt: Để lọc chỉ lấy groups có COUNT(*) > 5, dùng:

exercises.title: INNER JOIN result
exercises.prompt: INNER JOIN giữa Customers và Orders sẽ trả về:
exercises.options_json: ["T\u1ea5t c\u1ea3 customers d\u00f9 c\u00f3 order hay kh\u00f4ng", "T\u1ea5t c\u1ea3 orders d\u00f9 customer t\u1ed3n t\u1ea1i hay kh\u00f4ng", "Ch\u1ec9 customers \u0111\u00e3 c\u00f3 \u00edt nh\u1ea5t m\u1ed9t order", "T\u1ea5t c\u1ea3 customers v\u00e0 t\u1ea5t c\u1ea3 orders"]
exercises.answer: Chỉ customers đã có ít nhất một order

exercises.title: SQL View
exercises.options_json: ["L\u01b0u d\u1eef li\u1ec7u v\u1eadt l\u00fd nh\u01b0 table", "\u0110\u01b0\u1ee3c d\u00f9ng nh\u01b0 table trong c\u00e1c query kh\u00e1c", "T\u1ef1 \u0111\u1ed9ng c\u1eadp nh\u1eadt khi schema thay \u0111\u1ed5i", "Thay th\u1ebf ho\u00e0n to\u00e0n cho table"]
exercises.answer: Được dùng như table trong các query khác

exercises.title: COUNT variations
exercises.prompt: Sự khác biệt giữa COUNT(*) và COUNT(column_name) là:
exercises.options_json: ["Kh\u00f4ng c\u00f3 s\u1ef1 kh\u00e1c bi\u1ec7t", "COUNT(*) \u0111\u1ebfm t\u1ea5t c\u1ea3 rows; COUNT(col) b\u1ecf qua NULL values", "COUNT(*) ch\u1eadm h\u01a1n", "COUNT(col) \u0111\u1ebfm c\u1ea3 NULL values"]
exercises.answer: COUNT(*) đếm tất cả rows; COUNT(col) bỏ qua NULL values

exercises.title: LEFT JOIN
exercises.prompt: LEFT JOIN Customer c LEFT JOIN Order o ON c.id = o.customer_id. Customer không có order sẽ:
exercises.options_json: ["B\u1ecb lo\u1ea1i kh\u1ecfi k\u1ebft qu\u1ea3", "Xu\u1ea5t hi\u1ec7n v\u1edbi NULL cho c\u00e1c columns c\u1ee7a Order", "G\u00e2y l\u1ed7i query", "Xu\u1ea5t hi\u1ec7n nhi\u1ec1u l\u1ea7n"]
exercises.answer: Xuất hiện với NULL cho các columns của Order

exercises.title: ORDER BY
exercises.prompt: SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 3 trả về:
exercises.options_json: ["3 n\u01b0\u1edbc c\u00f3 d\u00e2n s\u1ed1 th\u1ea5p nh\u1ea5t", "3 n\u01b0\u1edbc c\u00f3 d\u00e2n s\u1ed1 cao nh\u1ea5t", "3 n\u01b0\u1edbc \u0111\u1ea7u ti\u00ean theo alphabet", "3 n\u01b0\u1edbc cu\u1ed1i c\u00f9ng theo alphabet"]
exercises.answer: 3 nước có dân số cao nhất
